title: lysimachia hypericoides
intro: Lysimachia hypericoides, also known as golden thread or creeping jenny, is a perennial flowering plant native to eastern North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing swelling and pain, as well as treating wounds and skin conditions. Lysimachia hypericoides is often prepared as an herbal tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
